dashboard.connectionCreatedDesc: The two charts are linked for analysis.
dashboard.connectionSummaryDefault: Correlation analysis between the two charts.
dashboard.assistantOutcome: Selected service: {{service}}. Chart type: {{chart}}. Interpreted goal: {{prompt}}. Result: {{result}}.

pulsoCsa.subtitle: Project blueprint and structure · Alt+P
pulsoCsa.dragEnvHint: Drop a .env file here or use the button above
pulsoCsa.emptyStateTitle: Describe the project you want to generate
pulsoCsa.emptyStateHint: e.g. Generate folder blueprint and endpoints for an order management system
pulsoCsa.noLocalEngineDesc: With a project folder set, the local CSA engine must be running. In the installed app, Python and npm are bundled; the first startup can take several minutes. Use the diagnostics panel below for the Python path and errors (log under app data). Without the engine, the cloud API writes on the server, not your folder.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsOnlyElectron: This panel only appears in the Electron app. In the browser, requests go to the cloud API and files are not written to the folder you type.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsUnavailable: Diagnostics unavailable (update the app or Electron preload).
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsEngineOff: stopped or unhealthy — files will not be written here
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsPackagedNote: Installed build (Program Files): the microservice is bundled under resources; to use a different copy on disk, set it via the file below or PULSO_API_ROOT on the shortcut.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsManualFileHint: Alternative: create {{path}} with a single line — the absolute path to the CSA api tree (same layout as pulso-csa-api/, including app/pulso_csa_local). Restart Electron.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsEnvUnset: PULSO_API_ROOT is not set on the Electron process.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsFolderUnset: Set the project folder path above (blur the field or use the folder icon to register it).
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsFolderOk: The project path matches an allowlist entry (or is under one).
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsFolderBad: This path is not on the allowlist. Blur the path field or use the folder picker to register it.
pulsoCsa.diagnosticsDevRelax: Dev mode: allowlist relaxed (PULSO_LOCAL_RELAX_ROOT_ALLOWLIST). Packaged builds use strict checks.

diagnosticsError.PULSO_API_ROOT_MISSING: Missing pulso-csa-api/ in the project (should be committed in PulsoFrontend) or bundled copy in the installer. Pull the repo or reinstall. Optional: PULSO_API_ROOT / app-data path file.
diagnosticsError.HEALTH_TIMEOUT: /health did not respond in time (up to ~10 minutes on first launch when packaged). Check stderr below and the log file. Common causes: installer built without the Python bundle, missing module, or .env/Mongo issues.
diagnosticsError.ENGINE_EXITED: The Python process exited before the server was ready. Check stderr below — often missing uvicorn, import error, or wrong Python on PATH.
diagnosticsError.NO_PORT: Could not bind a free TCP port on 127.0.0.1.

pulsoCsa.placeholderPrompt: e.g. Generate folder blueprint and endpoints for an order management system...
pulsoCsa.renameDesc: Enter a new name for this conversation.
pulsoCsa.emptyEnvDesc: Fill in the variable name and value
pulsoCsa.dupEnvDesc: A variable with this name already exists
pulsoCsa.notAuthDesc: Sign in to send a prompt
